subcodes.first_line: O servant of God! From the contents of thy letter it was understood that a number of friends requested from thee a book... And as to the meaning of the blessed verse "God will bring ease after hardship" [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی از مضمون نامه چنین مفهوم شد که جمعی یاران از تو خواهش کتاب و... و امّا معنی آيه مبارکه يجعل اللّه بعد عسر يسرا
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
